title: AI Agent Session Lint Rules
description: Machine-readable catalog of lint rules for AI agent session data cross-project consistency

categories.name: Session Audit
categories.description: Cross-project consistency checks using AI agent session data.

rules.description: GitHub secret set on sibling repos but not this project.
rules.trigger: gh secret set command found in agent history for 2+ siblings but not current project.
rules.message: Secret "{name}" is set on {count} sibling repos but not this project

rules.description: Canonical file has diverged from sibling repos.
rules.trigger: File exists in current project and siblings with 20-90% line overlap.
rules.message: "{file}" has {overlap}% overlap with {sibling} — may have diverged

rules.description: GitHub Actions workflow missing from this project.
rules.trigger: Workflow file exists in 2+ siblings but not current project (which has .github).
rules.message: Workflow "{workflow}" exists in {count} sibling repos but not this project

rules.description: Memory file references paths that no longer exist.
rules.trigger: Claude Code memory file contains path references to files that have been deleted or moved.
rules.message: Memory references "{path}" which no longer exists

rules.trigger: Two memory files from different projects have >60% line overlap.

rules.description: Same command run 3+ times consecutively in agent history.
rules.trigger: Agent history for the current project shows the same display string 3+ times in a row.

rules.description: Cyclic command pattern detected in agent history.
rules.trigger: Agent history shows a repeating sequence of 2-3 commands (e.g. A,B,A,B) repeated 2+ times.

rules.description: MEMORY.md exceeds Claude Code's session-load cap. The first 200 lines / 25KB are loaded every session; anything beyond is effectively invisible to the agent.
rules.message: MEMORY.md has {N} lines — only the first 200 are loaded. {excess} lines are effectively invisible.

dataSources.name: Aider
dataSources.notes: History file is per-project, stored in the project root.

dataSources.name: Amazon Q Developer
dataSources.notes: Semi-documented; file layout inferred from observation.

dataSources.name: Goose
dataSources.notes: Requires SQLite dependency to read session data.

dataSources.name: Windsurf
dataSources.notes: Partially documented; format marked unstable by vendor.
